name: Meat and Potato Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 large baking potatoes, peeled & cut into 1/2' cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add potato, carrots, and onion; cook and stir 3 minutes.
3. Stir in broth and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Reduce heat to medium.
4. Cover and cook 6 to 7 minutes more or until potatoes are tender, stirring once or twice.
5. Remove vegetables from wok; set aside.
6. Wipe out wok with a paper towel.
7. Heat wok over medium-high heat until hot.
8. Add beef and garlic; stir-fry 3 minutes or until meat is no longer pink.
9. Add parsley, paprika, cinnamon, cumin, remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper; cook and stir 1 minute.
10. Add vegetables; heat through.
